name: SPGP Super Polygon Grand Prix
short_description: It's all about speed, it’s all about the competition. Choose a car that suites you and race highly competitive AI at break neck speeds over a vast variety of locations. Unlock 48 tracks and 20 cars in Progress Mode. Check your ranking with Online Leaderboards.
detailed_description:
Full throttle retro racer.

Blast around homages to some of histories greatest tracks, as well as some that simply couldn’t exist. Visit London, Tokyo, Rome, USA, The Alps and more, with 48 tracks of exciting twists and turns to unlock and master. Choose your team, your car and then jump into a race, no tiresome menus to wade through, even the pathway to action has been accelerated!

Relive the style and excitement of 90s arcade racing boom with slick modern rendering technology, whilst filling your ears with 90s inspired custom soundtrack to keep your focus as you find that perfect line, outwitting the other 29 cars on the track.

Fight for a place on the Online leaderboard see how you rank globally.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
